5.11.99.en: Fixed energy monitor voltage/watt showing 1/10th of actual values on _TZ3210_w0qqde0g plugs (GH#137). Fixed BSEED TS0726 4-gang switch all buttons toggling together — moved to correct ZCL per-endpoint driver. Fixed _TZ321C_fkzihax8 5.8G radar sensor not reporting values — moved to presence_sensor_radar driver (NoroddH #97). Contact sensor IAS Zone conflict fix (Lasse_K). Switched email diagnostics to IMAP-primary (no more OAuth token expiry issues).
